allow:
Bash(osascript -e '
tell application "Safari" to activate
delay 0.5
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "Safari"
        -- 尝试查找并点击包含 "Get Started" 的按钮
        set buttonFound to false
        try
            set startButton to first button whose description contains "Get Started" or name contains "Get Started"
            click startButton
            set buttonFound to true
        end try
        if not buttonFound then
            -- 如果找不到按钮，尝试按键
            keystroke tab
        end if
    end tell
end tell
')
